zh.lifeSummary: 當Maria Hanmer於大約1522年出生在英國威爾斯福林爾韓麥時，她的父親Sir Thomas Hanmer49歲，母親Anne Watson44歲。她於大約1543年與Roger Kynaston or Knutson在英國威爾斯福林爾韓麥結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maria Hanmer于大约1522年出生在英国威尔斯福林爾韓麥时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Hanmer49岁，母亲Anne Watson44岁。她于大约1543年与Roger Kynaston or Knutson在英国威尔斯福林爾韓麥结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Hanmer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: habitational name from Hanmer (Flintshire), named with the Old English personal name Hagena + Old English mere ‘lake, pond’. A daughter of Sir David Hanmer, a Welsh judge in the 14th century, was married to the Welsh ruler Owen Glendower, who led the revolt against Henry IV's rule in Wales.
English: habitational name from Anmer (Norfolk), from Old English æned ‘duck’ + mere ‘lake, pond’.

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Maria Hanmer was born about 1522, in Hanmer, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas Hanmer, was 49 and her mother, Anne Watson, was 44. She married Roger Kynaston or Knutson about 1543, in Hanmer, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maria Hanmer est née environ 1522, à Hanmer, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Hanmer, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Anne Watson, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Kynaston or Knutson environ 1543, à Hanmer, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maria Hanmer um 1522 in Hanmer, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Hanmer 49 und ihre Mutter Anne Watson 44. Sie hat um 1543 in Hanmer, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom Roger Kynaston or Knutson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Hanmer è nata il circa 1522 nel Hanmer, Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Thomas Hanmer, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Anne Watson, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Roger Kynaston or Knutson circa 1543, nel Hanmer, Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Maria Hanmerが約1522年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアハンマーで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Hanmerは49歳，母Anne Watsonは44歳であった。約1543年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアハンマーでRoger Kynaston or Knutsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Maria Hanmer(이)가 대략 1522년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르 핸머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Hanmer(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Watson(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 대략 1543년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르 핸머에서 Roger Kynaston or Knutson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다.

Ela casou-se com Roger Kynaston or Knutson aproximadamente 1543, em Hanmer, Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 8 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maria Hanmer родилась около 1522 г. в местности ханмир, флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Hanmer было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Watson, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Kynaston or Knutson около 1543 г. в местности ханмир, флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей.

Se casó con Roger Kynaston or Knutson aproximadamente 1543, en Hanmer, Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas.
